description_long: This handbag features a structured rectangular body with a prominent woven pattern in black and beige, reminiscent of traditional basketry. The upper section and flap are made from a smooth, tan-colored material, likely faux leather or treated fabric, which contrasts with the textured lower portion. A single, circular bamboo or rattan handle is attached to the front, providing a natural accent and easy carrying. The flap closure extends over the top and is secured by a central strap, giving the bag a classic, artisanal look. The sides reveal the thickness of the materials and the handle's attachment points, while the back displays the full extent of the woven pattern. The overall design is both functional and decorative, suitable for urban environments where style and practicality are valued.
description: A rectangular handbag with a tan flap, black-and-beige woven pattern, and a circular bamboo handle, blending natural and synthetic materials for a stylish, artisanal look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tan flap, central strap, and circular bamboo handle against the woven patterned body.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the thickness of the bag, the curve of the flap, and the side profile of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uninterrupted black-and-beige woven pattern and the tan upper section.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the bag's depth and the handle's attachment.
attribute_strap_type: Single short circular bamboo handle attached to the front; no long or adjustable straps visible.
attribute_closure_mechanism: Flap closure with a central strap, likely secured by a magnetic snap or button underneath the flap.
attribute_decorative_elements: None, aside from the natural bamboo handle and the woven pattern.
attribute_pattern: Black-and-beige geometric woven pattern resembling waves or zigzags on the main body.
